title: OpenAI Codex App Added Migration, Plugin, And Settings Improvements
summary: OpenAI's Codex changelog for app version 26.608 records new migration flows from Claude Code and Claude Cowork setup, a revamped plugin management screen, broader settings search, and several workflow reliability fixes.

evidence_refs.license_note: Official Codex changelog reviewed for factual metadata; no provider prose copied.

impacts.recommended_action: Review imported configuration and plugin permissions when moving teams from Claude Code or Claude Cowork setup into Codex.
Re-check plugin installation flows, settings discoverability, and review-diff ordering before comparing Codex app behavior with pre-26.608 baselines.

detail.change_summary: Codex app 26.608 added migration support from adjacent coding-agent setups, improved plugin management and settings search, and changed several workflow reliability behaviors.

limitations: APW records the provider changelog metadata only; tenant eligibility, desktop platform rollout, and exact plugin marketplace availability can vary.
No raw changelog body is copied into the event.
